text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap and I decide to spend our day off by
going out for some fun. On our way back, we spot
a familiar face.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hello there. Back from an excursion, I
presume? I take it that you've enjoyed your day
off.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Are you on your way to training, Rudolf?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
"Training" might be an overstatement. It would be
more accurate to say I'm off to clear my head.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Of course, I do make sure to savor my days off.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps it's just my nature, but whenever I find
myself with free time, I'm somehow overcome with
the urge to run.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I get what you mean. My thoughts also
wander toward racing whenever I have spare
time...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Well, either that or food.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Anyway... Training, huh?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Would that be okay? ...I'll go get changed then.
Just give me one moment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The pair line up side by side, each set on
demonstrating their fearsome running prowess.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They sprint forward, their postures identical. Each
runner playfully fights for the lead, taking it and
losing it in turns.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Huff... I must say... running with somebody else is... always a rewarding experience.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I agree.
choice_data_list: You two have similar running styles.
You two have similar running styles.
Looks like it was a draw.
Looks like it was a draw.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I agree.
choice_data_list: You two have similar running styles.
You two have similar running styles.
Looks like it was a draw.
Looks like it was a draw.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Maybe so. But the way you run is
outstanding, Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That's why I study your race footage. Your
remarkable extensions, the way you dig into the
track...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hah! Receiving a compliment like that from you
makes me feel strangely self-conscious.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Still, regardless of effort, someone's running style
isn't something you can simply emulate.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
There must be something inherently similar about
the two of us.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Something similar? Like how we're around the
same height?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: That's not quite what I was talking about...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like racing with Symboli Rudolf has been
a constructive experience for Oguri Cap.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Haha... It isn't like we were competing in earnest .

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah... The goal here wasn't to win...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That said, the notion of a genuine contest does
sound agreeable.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
What do you say? How does a scrimmage strike
you?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That... would be an honor. You've shown me so
much kindness I can barely keep track!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Pffft... Barely keep track... Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You're quite droll, Oguri Cap!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Barely keep track... Hehe! I do apologize...
Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Um, I don't really follow, but... if you're happy,
then I'm happy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, they have the race as planned.
Oguri Cap, scrimmaging in front of a full crowd of
spectators, seems to be improving with every
passing moment.
